--- title: "Per-Capita Income" subtitle: "Annual per-capita personal income — county vs. state vs. national" --- Annual per-capita personal income from the Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) Regional Economic Accounts. Income includes wages, proprietors' income, dividends, interest, rent, and transfer receipts. ::: {.callout-note} ## BEA publication lag County-level income data is published annually with a lag of approximately 6--9 months. The most recent year shown may be one to two years behind the current calendar year. ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}

Income data not yet available. The BEA API key must be activated and the data pipeline run to populate this page. Check the Methodology page for details.

``` ::: :::
